data.name: AddFirstJobText
data.value: Add your first job to start using the app.

data.name: AddJobPage_CountryTip
data.value: 💡 Select the country where the job is performed…

data.name: AddJobPage_CurrencyTip
data.value: Select the currency you get paid in.

data.name: AddJobPage_TaxTip
data.value: 💡 Tip: Check your latest salary spec

data.name: AddJobPage_TemporaryInfo
data.value: ℹ️ As a temp employee, you are usually not entitled to paid vacation leave. Instead, you receive a vacation allowance that must be at least 12% of your earned salary. It is paid either monthly together with your salary or as a lump sum when employment ends (no later than one month afterwards).

data.name: Break_Error_TooLong
data.value: Break time cannot be longer than work time

data.name: CancelDialog_Message
data.value: Do you want to cancel without saving?

data.name: DeleteActiveJobMessage
data.value: You are deleting the active job. Select another job as active first, or delete all jobs.

data.name: DeleteJobMessageFormat
data.value: Do you want to delete '{0}' from {1}? This will delete all related shifts and data.

data.name: DeleteLastJobMessageFormat
data.value: You are deleting your LAST job '{0}'. You will need to create a new job to use the app. Continue?

data.name: DeleteOnCallConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this on-call shift on {0}?

data.name: DeleteShiftConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this shift on {0}?

data.name: DeleteSickLeaveConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this sick leave on {0}?

data.name: DeleteVacationConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this vacation day on {0}?

data.name: Dialog_RequiredFieldsMessage
data.value: Please fill in all required fields

data.name: EditJob_CancelMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel? Changes will not be saved.

data.name: GetStartedPrompt
data.value: Get started by creating your first job
data.comment: Prompt when no job is set up

data.name: HoursCredit
data.comment: Shown in flex balance when there are extra hours

data.name: HoursOwed
data.comment: Shown in flex balance when hours are owed

data.name: LastJobDeletedSuccessMessage
data.value: ✅ Last job deleted. You can create a new job via the 'Add' button.

data.name: MonthlyGoalReached
data.comment: Shown when monthly hours goal is exactly met

data.name: NoJobAlertMessage
data.value: You need to create a job first in Settings.

data.name: NoJobSetup
data.comment: Message when no job is set up

data.name: NoLoss
data.comment: Text when no hours are lost

data.name: NoShiftsMessage
data.value: Click the button above to add your first shift

data.name: NoShiftsThisMonth
data.comment: Message when no shifts for current month

data.name: OBRule_Rate_Tip
data.value: Enter pay per hour (including base + unsocial hours bonus)

data.name: OBTips
data.value: 💡 Tip: If no rule exists for a specific time, no unsocial hours pay is applied, even if evening or night is active.

data.name: OnCall_ActiveHoursInfo
data.value: You will receive regular hourly wage + any overtime compensation for this time

data.name: OnCall_ActiveHoursTip
data.value: 💡 Number of hours you were called in and worked actively

data.name: OnCall_Explanation_Permanent
data.value: As permanent employee: On-call compensation according to agreement + regular wage for active working time.

data.name: OnCall_Explanation_Temporary
data.value: As hourly employee: On-call compensation + hourly wage for active working time must be agreed separately.

data.name: OnCall_NotesPlaceholder
data.value: E.g., number of call-outs, type of on-call, contact info...

data.name: OnCall_OBNotice
data.value: ⚠️ Overtime supplements are calculated in the monthly report

data.name: OnCall_Save_ErrorMissing
data.value: Please check that all required fields are filled

data.name: QuickActionsTooltip
data.value: 💡 Register work time or view salary reports

data.name: RegularShift_CalculationNote
data.value: Salary will be shown in the monthly report. Here you only see the working time for this shift.

data.name: RegularShift_Validation_ShiftTooLong
data.value: Shift cannot be longer than 24 hours

data.name: RegularShift_Validation_StartBeforeEnd
data.value: Start time must be before end time

data.name: Save_Error_Message
data.value: Could not save unsocial hours rule: {0}

data.name: SwipeDeleteJobHint
data.value: 💡 Swipe left to delete a job

data.name: SwipeDeleteOBHint
data.value: 💡 Swipe right to edit, swipe left to delete a rule

data.name: Tax_Tip
data.value: 💡 Tip: Check your latest payslip for exact tax rate

data.name: Vacation_Explanation_PaidPermanent
data.value: 💰 Paid vacation – Salary is calculated based on current monthly wage

data.name: Vacation_Explanation_PaidTemporary
data.value: ⚠️ Hourly employees cannot have paid vacation – choose 'Unpaid leave'

data.name: Vacation_PermanentInfo
data.value: Permanent employee – entitled to paid vacation

data.name: Vacation_TemporaryInfo
data.value: Hourly employee – Receives holiday pay as a percentage of wages

data.name: Vacation_Tip
data.value: 💡 Enter your saved vacation days from your latest payslip

data.name: Vacation_Error_InvalidHours
data.value: Planned work hours must be a positive number

data.name: Vacation_Error_InvalidKvot
data.value: Vacation ratio must be a positive number

data.name: Vacation_Validation_PaidNotAllowedForHourly
data.value: Hourly employees cannot have paid vacation – choose 'Unpaid leave'

data.name: Validation_OBNameRequired
data.value: Enter a name for the unsocial hours rule

data.name: Vacation_Validation_RatioPositive
data.value: Vacation ratio must be a positive number

data.name: Vacation_Validation_HoursPositive
data.value: Planned work hours must be a positive number

data.name: Vacation_Ratio_Hint
data.value: 💡 Enter 1.0 as default. Higher ratio for unplanned vacation (e.g. 1.5)

data.name: Vacation_Hours_Hint
data.value: 💡 Enter how many hours you would have worked this day

data.name: Vacation_Info_OneDayRegistered
data.value: 📅 Registers 1 day of vacation for selected date

data.name: Vacation_Info_SalaryCalculated
data.value: 💰 Salary calculated in monthly report using current pay

data.name: Vacation_Unpaid_Info
data.value: No salary paid. Registered for documentation and statistics.

data.name: SickLeave_Explanation_ShouldHaveWorked
data.value: 🤒 Was scheduled to work — first day: waiting day, then 80% sick pay

data.name: SickLeave_Explanation_WorkedPartially
data.value: ⚡ Worked partially — paid for worked hours + sick pay for remainder

data.name: SickLeave_Explanation_WouldBeFree
data.value: 🏠 Sick during planned day off — no sick pay

data.name: SickLeave_Validation_WorkedMustBePositive
data.value: Worked hours must be greater than 0

data.name: SickLeave_Validation_WorkedLessThanScheduled
data.value: Worked hours must be less than scheduled hours

data.name: SickLeave_Validation_WorkedTooSmall
data.value: Worked hours must be greater than 0

data.name: SickLeave_Validation_WorkedTooLarge
data.value: Worked hours must be less than scheduled hours

data.name: Sick_Hint_ScheduledZero
data.value: 💡 Enter the scheduled hours according to your plan

data.name: Sick_Placeholder_Notes
data.value: e.g., doctor’s note, symptoms, return date

data.name: Sick_NoRightToPay
data.value: No right to sick pay for this day

data.name: Sick_NoPayNotes
data.value: Sick day - would have been off (no pay)

data.name: Conflict_SickWithVacation
data.value: Already approved vacation on this day

data.name: Conflict_AlreadySick
data.value: Sick leave already exists for this day

data.name: Conflict_ReplaceRegular
data.value: Do you want to replace working hours ({0}-{1}) with {2}?

data.name: Conflict_ReplaceOnCall
data.value: Do you want to replace on-call shift with {0}?

data.name: Shift_ExistingSameType
data.value: Shift of type {0} already exists for {1}

data.name: Shift_EditExistingConfirmation
data.value: Do you want to edit the existing shift?

data.name: Shift_ReplaceExistingConfirmation
data.value: Do you want to replace {0} with {1}?

data.name: Shift_EnterTime
data.value: Enter start and end time for the shift

data.name: Shift_ChooseSickType
data.value: Which type of sick day do you want to register?

data.name: Conflict_WorkDuringLeave_Title
data.value: You have a work shift during your {0}:

data.name: Conflict_WorkDuringLeave_Body
data.value: You cannot have {0} on the same day you work.

data.name: Conflict_WorkDuringLeave_ConfirmRemove
data.value: Do you want to remove the work shift?

data.name: Conflict_Merge_Header
data.value: You already have {0} that overlaps or is adjacent:

data.name: Conflict_Merge_Question
data.value: Do you want to merge into one continuous period?

data.name: Conflict_SickDay
data.value: You are on sick leave this day:

data.name: Conflict_ShortenSickLeave_Question
data.value: Do you want to shorten the sick leave so you can work?

data.name: Conflict_AutoRemove_Header
data.value: You have {0} work shifts during the sick period:

data.name: Conflict_AutoRemove_Question
data.value: Do you want the system to automatically remove these shifts?

data.name: Shift_SickSaved
data.value: Sick leave for {0} days has been saved!

data.name: Shift_SickSavedWithRemoved
data.value: Sick leave saved! {0} work shifts were removed.

data.name: Shift_SickRemoved
data.value: Sick leave has been completely removed.

data.name: Shift_WorkRemovedAndLeaveSaved
data.value: The work shift was removed and {0} was saved!

data.name: Vacation_NotAllowed_Temporary
data.value: Temporary employees cannot have paid vacation

data.name: Vacation_NotAllowed_Temporary_Detail
data.value: Temporary employees cannot have paid vacation – choose unpaid leave

data.name: Vacation_InsufficientDays
data.value: Not enough vacation days remaining ({0:F1} days)

data.name: Vacation_WorkShiftNotFound
data.value: Could not find saved work shift

data.name: Vacation_AlreadyRegistered
data.value: You already have vacation registered on this date

data.name: Vacation_Conflict_Regular
Vacation_Conflict_SickLeave
data.value:
You are already on sick leave this day: 🤒 Sick leave ({0} days)
Remove the sick leave before registering vacation.

data.name: Vacation_Conflict_OnCall
data.value:
You already have an on-call shift this day: 📞 On-call shift
Remove the on-call shift before registering vacation.

data.name: Vacation_Conflict_Generic
data.value: You already have a shift registered this day. Remove it before registering vacation.

data.name: ShiftValidation_Vacation_AlreadyExists
data.value: Vacation is already registered on this day.

data.name: ShiftValidation_SickLeave_Exists
data.value: You are on sick leave this day.

data.name: ShiftValidation_WorkShift_Exists
data.value: A work shift is already registered on this day.

data.name: ShiftValidation_FullDay_Sick_Title
data.value: You are on sick leave this day (FULL DAY).

data.name: ShiftValidation_FullDay_Sick_CannotWork
data.value: You cannot work while on sick leave.

data.name: ShiftValidation_FullDay_Sick_Shorten
data.value: Do you want to shorten the sick leave?

data.name: ShiftValidation_FullDay_Vacation_Title
data.value: You are on vacation this day (FULL DAY).

data.name: ShiftValidation_FullDay_Vacation_CannotWork
data.value: You cannot work while on vacation.

data.name: ShiftValidation_FullDay_Vacation_Shorten
data.value: Do you want to shorten the vacation?

data.name: Conflict_WorkShiftSavedAfterShorten
data.value: {0} The work shift has been saved!

data.name: WorkShift_Overlap_ChangeTime
data.value: Change the time to avoid overlap.

data.name: WorkShift_SaveSuccess_Vacation
data.value: ✅ Vacation for {0} days has been saved!

data.name: ShiftTimesHint
data.value: 💡 Tip: These times should normally match your unsocial hours rules.

data.name: NoOBRulesText
data.value: Add an unsocial hour rule manually, or use a template to get started.

data.name: OBTemplates_InfoText
data.value: Templates are examples. Adjust times and amounts to match your agreement.

data.name: OBTemplates_SelectToPreview
data.value: Select a template to preview its rules.

data.name: OBTemplates_ReplaceConfirmMessage
data.value: This will remove all existing OB rules for this job and replace them with the selected template.

data.name: OBTemplates_AmountsNote
data.value: 📌 Template amounts are examples. After adding a template, you can edit the rates in Settings → Unsocial Hour settings.

data.name: OBTemplate_Standard_Desc
data.value: Common Unsocial Hour rules for municipal healthcare (editable)

data.name: RegularShift_DayTypeHint
data.value: 💡 Mark this shift as a public holiday or big holiday if it applies.

data.name: Salary_NoReport_CreateJob
data.value: No salary report yet — create a job first.

data.name: OB_UsingFallback
data.value: No events to calculate. Showing estimate from current rules.

data.name: RegularShift_ExtraShiftHint
data.value: 💡 Mark whether the passport is ordered / urgent extra work. May provide additional compensation depending on the rules.

data.name: ExtraShiftSettings_Tip
data.value: 💡 Enable replacement for passes marked as extra passes.

data.name: ObInfo_FallbackUsed
data.value: Overtime is calculated from the current rules (no Overtime events found for this period).

data.name: ObInfo_NoRulesConfigured
data.value: Overtime is not configured. Add Unsocial hour rules in Settings.

data.name: OnCallSettings_Tip
data.value: 💡 Set how on-call pay should be calculated.

data.name: OnCall_Validation_NotEnabled
data.value: On-call is not enabled in settings.

data.name: OnCall_Validation_CalloutZero
data.value: Each callout must have a valid time interval.

data.name: OnCall_Validation_CalloutTooLong
data.value: A callout interval is too long.

data.name: OnCall_TotalsHint
data.value: Pay and OB are calculated in Salary based on callout times.

data.name: OnCall_CalloutsTip
data.value: 💡 Add each time interval when you were called out. Overtime will be calculated from these times.

data.name: Salary_OnCall_Hint
data.value: 💡 Standby compensation is shown here. Premium pay for active time is shown separately.
